title: dombeya subviscosa
intro: Dombeya subviscosa, a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, is a member of the hibiscus family and is commonly known as the yellow dombeya. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, which have been shown to have potential health benefits. The leaves and bark of the plant are used to prepare herbal remedies, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Dombeya subviscosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, ointments, and other medicinal products.
